records.ety: [L. militare, militatum, to be a soldier, fr. miles, militis, soldier.]
records.morph: [imp. & p. p. Militated (?); p. pr. & vb. n. Militating (?).]

defs: To make war; to fight; to contend; -- usually followed by against and with.
quotes: These are great questions, where great names militate against each other.
The invisible powers of heaven seemed to militate on the side of the pious emperor.
